article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures. His production style is characterized by a fusion of electronic and dancehall elements, drawing from his Mexican background.

He has collaborated with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer, among other notable names in the music industry. These collaborations have helped establish his presence in the global electronic music scene.

Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes all of his samples, loops, and drums used in various of his works, offering insight into his production techniques.
His work is often associated with artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, reflecting a broader network within the electronic music community.
